title: SimpleNoChat
description: Completely disables chat on the server, commands are still usable (with tab complete).
body:
**Completely** removes chat from the server. Commands are still usable with tab-completing.
A simple message appears in the server console when it is enabled.



This is the message you get when you try to chat:

![NoChat message.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28a6e279d9961e3148a21c2eb7c87c0d1ceebea5_0.webp)



_Currently on Paper 1.21.x only. You may request other versions as well, as I plan to expand this project._
